description_long: This is a highly muscular adult male figure with a bald head and a prominent tattoo on the upper left chest and shoulder. The body is anatomically detailed, showing defined musculature in the arms, chest, abdomen, and legs. The arms are extended outward to the sides, and the hands are open with fingers slightly spread. The figure is unclothed, revealing the natural contours and proportions of the human form. The skin tone is a light, natural shade, and the surface appears smooth with a matte finish. The overall stance is neutral and balanced, suitable for use as a generic urban pedestrian.
description: A bald, muscular adult male figure with a chest tattoo, detailed anatomy, and a neutral standing pose with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muscular chest, abs, facial features, and prominent tattoo on the left chest and shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, chest, arm, and leg musculature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad back, shoulder muscles, and the backs of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, chest, arm, and leg musculature, mirroring the left side.
